title: Packet 050 And Packet 051 Authority Plus Execution Packet Publication Gate
objective: Publish Packet 050 closure authority, Packet 051 decision authority, and the Packet 053 relay search reset execution packet authority through the parent-root boundary, then resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` without executing source edits.
active_role: Olares Authority And Execution Packet Publication Operator
dependency_note: Packet 051 decided the relay search reset source/test trial may open only after Packet 050 closure authority, Packet 051 decision authority, and Packet 053 execution authority are published and `/home/olares/code/apex` is resynchronized.
required_inputs: Current Packet 050 closure handoff and Packet 050 JSON completion state
Current Packet 051 decision handoff and Packet 051 JSON completion state
Current Packet 052 draft and Packet 053 execution draft
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness
Current `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count
constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit and push containing only Packet 050 closure authority, Packet 051 decision authority, Packet 052 draft authority, Packet 053 execution packet authority, routing, and roadmap updates needed for this gate
A host mirror resync record proving `/home/olares/code/apex` reached clean parity with the published commit and contains Packet 053 execution authority
A publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording staged scope, commit hash, push result, host pre/post state, excluded drift, and the next execution candidate
validation_steps: Reconfirm parent-root status and distinguish Packet 050/051 closure authority and Packet 053 execution authority from unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift.
Reconfirm source files, package files, and lockfiles remain clean and outside the publication scope.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at `64e7eaa81c4ab5d4168f7da571df1df2c0f1e1a4` before publication.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 050 closure authority, Packet 051 decision authority, Packet 052 draft authority, Packet 053 execution packet authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope before committing.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication only if staged scope is exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit only if it can be done non-destructively.
Do not execute source edits in Packet 052.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, remote rewrite, migration approval, force/reset/clean, rollback, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 052 is prepared to publish the Packet 053 execution authority before any host-side relay search reset source/test execution.
next_action: Execute only as a bounded authority and execution-packet publication gate. Do not approve migration or execute the relay search reset source/test trial.
